active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed two keybinding bugs (ctrl-shift-a in Editor, secondary-shift-c in Workspace), removed redundant indent/outdent blocks from keymap.json, and rewrote Typst cheat sheet and markdown guide for macOS-only notation (Cmd/Opt instead of Ctrl/Cmd/Alt).

memory_candidates.content: Zed keybinding architecture on macOS: Zed defaults use cmd- internally but keymap.json uses secondary- for platform-adaptive bindings (Cmd on macOS, Ctrl on Linux). Custom bindings that need fixed Ctrl use explicit ctrl- prefix. When documenting for macOS-only, resolve secondary- to Cmd, keep ctrl- as Ctrl, and use Opt instead of Alt. Zed keeps Ctrl+G, Ctrl+Tab, and Ctrl+` as Ctrl even on macOS (not Cmd).
